howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. Done.
howItWorks.subtitle: No account needed for your first 8 pages. Just upload and download.
howItWorks.step1Body: Drag & drop or click to select. Works with every major Indian bank, including password-protected files.
howItWorks.step2Body: Pick Excel, CSV, OFX for Tally, QFX for QuickBooks, or Google Sheets — each optimized for its target.
howItWorks.step3Body: File is ready in under 15 seconds. Clean columns, correct dates, every transaction captured accurately.

features.label: Features
features.title: Built for accountants & finance teams
features.subtitle: Everything you need to convert bank statements — nothing you don't.
features.fastBody: Multi-page PDFs in under 15 seconds. No queuing, no waiting room.
features.privateBody: Files are processed in memory and never stored. Your data stays yours.
features.accurateBody: Amounts, dates, and references pulled precisely from structured bank PDFs.
features.banksBody: Public sector, private, cooperative, and small finance banks all supported.
features.pricingBody: First 8 pages free. Then ₹49 per document — no subscription traps.
features.formatsBody: Excel, CSV, OFX for Tally, QFX for QuickBooks, and Google Sheets in one tool.
features.passwordBody: Enter your PDF password at upload — most Indian bank PDFs are DOB-locked.
features.anyAccountBody: Savings, current, salary, NRE/NRO — any statement format from any year.
features.instantBody: No email delivery, no waiting. Click Convert and your file downloads immediately.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Loved by finance professionals
testimonials.q1: Saves me 3–4 hours every month. Best tool for CA reconciliation work — the OFX export for Tally is seamless.
testimonials.q2: We process 40–50 statements a month for clients. Convert Statement handles all banks perfectly. Worth every rupee.
testimonials.q3: Downloaded 12 months of HDFC statements and had them all in Excel in under 5 minutes. Incredible time saver.

pricing.label: Pricing

pricing.subtitle: Start free. Only pay when you need more.
pricing.note: {payg} charges ₹49 per document regardless of page count. {pro} plans give you a shared monthly page pool.
pricing.freeDesc: Try it out — no card needed
pricing.paygDesc: No subscription, pay only when you need

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Over 30 banks including SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis, Kotak, PNB, Bank of Baroda, Canara, Union Bank, IndusInd, Yes Bank, IDFC First, Federal Bank, RBL, Bandhan, and more. Email us if yours isn't listed.
faq.a2: Yes. PDFs are processed in memory and deleted immediately after conversion. Nothing is stored on disk or in a database. We follow GDPR and India's IT Act 2000.
faq.a3: Yes. Enter the password during upload — most Indian banks lock PDFs with your date of birth or mobile number. We never store the password.
faq.q4: How does the 8 free pages work?
faq.a4: Every new account gets 8 pages free — no card needed. That covers most 1-3 month statements. After that, pay ₹49 per document or choose a monthly plan.
faq.q5: How do I import into Tally?
faq.a5: Export as OFX from Convert Statement, then import into Tally ERP or Tally Prime via the Bank Reconciliation module. Takes about two minutes.
faq.a6: Yes. We accept UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM), all Visa/Mastercard/RuPay cards, net banking, and wallets via Razorpay.
